chunk:
CHUNK:013/021
There were two cruise ship jackets lying on the bed and she nodded for me to take the red one and then waved me back again as she put on the yellow. Rachael slipped the pistol into the outside pocket, only to grumble when it didn\u2019t fit. She lifted the back of her jacket and stuffed it into the back pocket of her jeans, shrugging when I caught her eye, as if to say it was good enough. \u201cHow do you want to do this?\u201d I said with a nod at the door. Rachael grinned and said, \u201cWith as much drama as possible, honey.\u201d Rachael took a breath, grabbed a Boston Red Sox baseball cap from the closet, and tugged it onto her head. \u201cYou ready?\u201d \u201cYes,\u201d I said. \u201cWell then, Constable. Let\u2019s go.\u201d Rachael gestured for me to go first with a wave of my MP5 and I headed for the door. \n 10 The diary had distracted me, and I should have known that diamond smugglers who had successfully evaded capture while being on a watchlist would have some skills, skills which Rachael demonstrated as she grabbed the collar of my jacket and marched me into the corridor as soon as I had opened the door. \u201cEverybody down on the floor,\u201d she shouted the second I was visible. \u201cI have the constable\u2019s guns, and I ain\u2019t afraid to use them.\u201d Rachael was loud, she was clear, and she was commanding. The Dreamcaster security guards dropped onto the deck and the few passengers in the corridor scattered, hurrying back the way they had come with an impressive urgency that belied their age. Only Gaba remained standing, and Rachael snorted as he stared at her through the iron sights of his MP5. \u201cThis only ends one way,\u201d he said, dialling up the macho as only Gaba can. \u201cRight,\u201d Rachael said, gripping my collar a little tighter and pushing me forward, slowly but surely, closer and closer to Gaba. \u201cAnd how\u2019s that working for you, eh? Kiddo?\u201d Kiddo. Rachael had a way with words, and despite the tension and the thought of what came next, I have to say; she was growing on me. But then\u2026 You know? Gaba. Sergeant Gaba Alatak wasn\u2019t the leader of Greenland\u2019s Special Response Unit without having put in the time and without convincing the commissioner and senior officers in Greenland and Denmark that he was the man for the job. I never had cause to doubt his operational ability. But it did bother me a little that he had gone full macho when Rachael pushed me into the corridor, without at least trying to deflate the situation before it spiralled out of control. That was my job, and I was good at it. But I was missing something. Unfortunately, with a submachine gun pressed into my back, my brain was focused on keeping things simple and thinking ahead. Second guessing Gaba was a little out of reach as Rachael continued to push me towards the big, bald leader of the SRU. Gaba walked backwards with baby steps, growling at the ship\u2019s security guard to stay down when he flinched. He kept his gaze fixed on Rachael, avoiding eye contact with me \u2013 not even the slightest flicker of reassurance that everything was going to be all right \u2013 as he focused on the diamond smuggler. \u201cWhat do you need, Rachael?\u201d he asked, as we moved further along the corridor. I felt Rachael relax a little as Gaba changed his tone to that of a slightly aggressive negotiator instead of a steely-eyed operator ready to take her down. Okay, maybe I did have some extra brain capacity to spend on deciphering Gaba. But the macho man of mystery was quickly running out of corridor, and as we approached a larger lounge area with elevators and open staircases leading above and below our deck, I guessed Gaba was going to have to do something, before Rachael forced his hand. I took a breath and opened my mouth, ready to close my eyes and clap my hands to my ears when Saarullik tossed a flashbang grenade in front of us or drop to the ground when Taateraaq burst through the ceiling panels above us to take her down as I imagined Gaba would have briefed him. But even as I tried to anticipate the unexpected, I would never have guessed what Gaba was about to do when we entered the open lounge. \u201cThis is as far as I go,\u201d he said, lowering his MP5 and taking several long strides to a position in the middle of the open area. Gaba gestured at the stairs, suggesting to Rachael that they would be safer. \u201cAnd why would that be?\u201d Rachael said as she jerked me to a stop just five metres away from Gaba. \u201cWhat\u2019s waiting for me on the stairs?\u201d \u201cNothing,\u201d Gaba said. \u201cI just don\u2019t like confined spaces and elevators\u2026\u201d He nodded at the ones to Rachael\u2019s right. \u201cElevators can be tricky, and hot. You don\u2019t want to get stuck in one, believe me.\u201d \u201cSo\u2026\u201d Rachael renewed her grip on my collar. \u201cYou\u2019re just going to let me go?\u201d \u201cI am.\u201d \u201cJust like that?\u201d \u201cSure,\u201d Gaba said. \u201cJust like that.\u201d And then he caught my eye, and I half expected him to say something in Danish. But as he kept his eyes on me, his words were for Rachael and her alone. \u201cBut if anything happens to Constable Jensen,\u201d he said. \u201cRight,\u201d Rachael said, with a sigh, as if she had heard similar threats before and far too many times to recall. \u201cYou\u2019ll hunt me down and end me, right?\u201d \u201cWrong,\u201d Gaba said, lifting his chin to look directly at Rachael. \u201cI won\u2019t have to hunt you because you can\u2019t go anywhere. You\u2019ll get frustrated, and you\u2019ll come to me. You\u2019ll give yourself up.

CTX: CHUNK=013/021
SETTING: CRUISE-SHIP CABIN
EVENT: TWO JACKETS ON BED
ACTION: RACHAEL NODS→CONSTABLE TAKES RED-JACKET; WAVES→WEARS YELLOW-JACKET
ACTION: RACHAEL SLIPS PISTOL→OUTSIDE-POCKET; GRUMBLES∵ NO-FIT
ACTION: RACHAEL LIFTS JACKET-BACK→STUFFS PISTOL→BACK-POCKET(JEANS)
ACTION: RACHAEL SHRUGS WHEN CATCHES CONSTABLE EYE
DIALOGUE:
  CONSTABLE: "HOW DO YOU WANT TO DO THIS?" (NODS AT DOOR)
  RACHAEL: "WITH AS MUCH DRAMA AS POSSIBLE, HONEY"
ACTION: RACHAEL GRABS BOSTON-RED-SOX CAP→HEAD
DIALOGUE:
  CONSTABLE: "YOU READY?"
  CONSTABLE: "YES"
  RACHAEL: "WELL THEN, CONSTABLE. LET'S GO"
ACTION: RACHAEL GESTURES(CONSTABLE FIRST) ∧ CONSTABLE HEADS FOR DOOR
CTX: CRUISE-SHIP CORRIDOR
STATE: CONSTABLE DISTRACTED BY DIARY ∧ ASSUMED DIAMOND-SMUGGLERS SKILLED
ACTION: RACHAEL GRABS CONSTABLE COLLAR→MARCHES INTO CORRIDOR ON DOOR-OPEN
DIALOGUE:
  RACHAEL: "EVERYBODY DOWN ON THE FLOOR"
  RACHAEL: "I HAVE THE CONSTABLE'S GUNS ∧ I AIN'T AFRAID TO USE THEM"
ACTION: GUARDS DROP ∧ PASSENGERS SCATTER ∧ ONLY GABA REMAINS AIMING MP5
DIALOGUE:
  GABA: "THIS ONLY ENDS ONE WAY"
ACTION: RACHAEL GRIPS CONSTABLE COLLAR TIGHTER→PUSHES CONSTABLE→GABA
DIALOGUE:
  RACHAEL: "AND HOW'S THAT WORKING FOR YOU, EH? KIDDO?"
OBSERVATION: CONSTABLE RECOGNIZES GABA=SRU-SERGEANT GABA ALATAK
COMMENT: CONSTABLE TRUSTS GABA'S OPERATIONAL-ABILITY; CONCERN: NO DE-ESCALATION
STATE: CONSTABLE THINKS MISSING SOLUTION ∧ FOCUS=SIMPLE AHEAD
ACTION: GABA WALKS BACKWARDS BABY-STEPS; GROWLS AT GUARD
ACTION: GABA FIXES GAZE ON RACHAEL; AVOIDS EYE-CONTACT WITH CONSTABLE
DIALOGUE:
  GABA: "WHAT DO YOU NEED, RACHAEL?"
EFFECT: RACHAEL RELAXES SLIGHTLY
LOCATION: OPEN-LOUNGE WITH ELEVATORS ∧ STAIRS
EXPECTATION: CONSTABLE AWAITS FLASHBANG OR ABOVE-TEAM
SURPRISE: GABA CHANGES TACTIC
DIALOGUE:
  GABA: "THIS IS AS FAR AS I GO" (LOWERS MP5; MOVES TO AREA-CENTER)
ACTION: GABA GESTURES→STAIRS
DIALOGUE:
  RACHAEL: "AND WHY WOULD THAT BE? WHAT'S WAITING FOR ME ON THE STAIRS?"
  GABA: "NOTHING. I JUST DON'T LIKE CONFINED-SPACES ∧ ELEVATORS"
  GABA: "ELEVATORS CAN BE TRICKY ∧ HOT. YOU DON'T WANT TO GET STUCK"
DIALOGUE:
  RACHAEL: "SO…YOU'RE JUST GOING TO LET ME GO?"
  GABA: "I AM"
  RACHAEL: "JUST LIKE THAT?"
  GABA: "SURE. JUST LIKE THAT"
ACTION: GABA CATCHES CONSTABLE EYE
DIALOGUE:
  GABA: "BUT IF ANYTHING HAPPENS TO CONSTABLE JENSEN…"
  RACHAEL: "RIGHT…YOU'LL HUNT ME DOWN ∧ END ME, RIGHT?"
  GABA: "WRONG. I WON'T HAVE TO HUNT YOU∵ YOU CAN'T GO ANYWHERE."
  GABA: "YOU'LL GET FRUSTRATED ∧ COME TO ME."
  GABA: "YOU'LL GIVE YOURSELF UP"
